description: Use the N/action module to execute business logic to update the state of records in view mode. Action APIs are the programmatic equivalent to clicking a button in the UI.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes the record action and returns action results in an object.

methods.name: execute.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously executes the record action and returns the action results in an object.

methods.name: executeBulk
methods.description: Executes an asynchronous bulk record action and returns its task ID for later status inquiry.

params.name: options.params
params.description: An array of parameter objects. Each object corresponds to one record ID for which the action is to be executed.

params.name: options.condition
params.description: The condition used to select record IDs. Only action.ALL_QUALIFIED_INSTANCES is currently supported.

params.name: options.paramCallback
params.description: The name of the function that takes a record ID and returns the parameter object for the specified record ID.

methods.name: find
methods.description: Returns a plain JavaScript object of available record actions for the given record type.

methods.name: find.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously returns a plain JavaScript object of available record actions for the given record type.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Returns an executable record action for the given record type.

methods.name: get.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously returns an executable record action for the given record type.

methods.name: getBulkStatus
methods.description: Returns the current status of action.executeBulk(options) for the specified task ID.

params.name: options.taskId
params.description: The task ID returned by a previous action.executeBulk(options) call.

methods.name: execute
methods.description: Executes the action and returns the action results in an object.

params.name: options
params.description: Action parameters. The parameters depend on the action implementation.

params.name: options.params.recordId
params.description: The record instance ID of the record on which the action is to be performed.

methods.name: execute.promise
methods.description: Executes the action asynchronously and returns the action results in an object.

params.name: options
params.description: Action parameters. The parameters depend on the action implementation.

params.name: options.params.recordId
params.description: The record instance ID of the record on which the action is to be performed.

methods.name: executeBulk
methods.description: Executes an asynchronous bulk record action and returns its task ID for later status inquiry.

params.name: options.params
params.description: An array of parameter objects. Each object corresponds to one record ID for which the action is to be executed.

params.name: options.condition
params.description: The condition used to select record IDs. Only action.ALL_QUALIFIED_INSTANCES is currently supported.

params.name: options.paramCallback
params.description: The name of the function that takes a record ID and returns the parameter object for the specified record ID.

properties.name: recordType
properties.description: The type of the record on which the action is to be performed.
